## Purpose

Use this template when you want evaluator review on one workflow payload for the current managed execution endpoint.

## Workflow Type

What workflow are you trying to validate?

## Sample Payload

Share one representative payload. Redact anything sensitive if needed.

```json
{}
```

## Target Schema

What schema or contract should the verified result satisfy?

## Downstream Risk

What happens if the workflow does not reach a verified result and must end in safe failure?

## Preferred Return Method

- [ ] Polling
- [ ] Webhook

## Optional Timing Constraints

Share any timing window, deadline, or retry expectation if it matters.

## Contact Preference

How should follow-up happen for this payload request?

- [ ] Email
- [ ] Issue comments
- [ ] GitHub Discussion
